creator: gerrit.kuehn@aei.mpg.de
text:
I installed 14.2 (releng/14.2-n269506-c8918d6c7412 GENERIC arm) on a RPI2 Model B V1.1. It works overall fine, but the PWR and ACT LEDs do not work at all.
They are found as
gpioled0: <GPIO LEDs> on ofwbus0
and /dev/led/ has PWR and ACT, but echoing "1" to them does not turn them on, either.
